subcodes.first_line: Were this Servant to attempt to recount the sorrows that have befallen Him, it would not be possible, and none save God can enumerate them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر این عبد بخواهد ذکر احزان وارده نماید ممکن نه و احدی جز حق بر احصای آن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
